title: Language Change
scenario: Verify that changing the headset language via Device Settings successfully applies after completing the DFU software update process.
steps: Pair and connect the headset to the device.
Launch the app on the connected device.
Navigate to Device Settings within the app.
Select a new language from the scrollable list.
Confirm the language update via the popup by tapping 'Update now' (options: 'Later' or 'Update now').
Proceed through the software update (DFU) process.
Verify that the language change is applied successfully after the update completes.
expected: The headset's language is successfully changed to the newly selected language after the DFU update completes.
